{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Akura Constance
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Akura Constance]] is old enough to be [[Mercy's mother]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12">''Dreadgod'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
